steps: Go to https://app.flagsmith.com/ and log in or create a free account
Select or create an Organisation and then a Project
In the left sidebar, select the environment you want to use (e.g., 'Development' or 'Production')
Click 'SDK Keys' in the left sidebar under the environment name
For server-side usage: click 'Create Server-side Environment Key', give it a name, and copy the generated key
For client-side usage: the Client-side Environment Key is shown directly on the SDK Keys page — copy it
Pass the key in the X-Environment-Key header on all API requests to edge.api.flagsmith.com/api/v1

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Environment Key
credential_fields.description: The Flagsmith environment key (client-side or server-side). Found under SDK Keys in the environment settings.

notes: Client-side environment keys (starting with 'ser.') are safe to embed in frontend code
Server-side keys must be kept secret as they bypass evaluation rules and return all flags
Flagsmith offers a generous free tier: up to 50,000 requests/month and 10 feature flags
Self-hosted option available; change the base URL to your own instance if self-hosting
The Admin API requires a separate API key found in Account Settings > API Keys

test_endpoint.description: List all feature flags for the environment. Returns an array of flag objects.
